page_metadata.biotools__summary: Capybara is a R tool to measure cell identity and fate transitions. This approach is designed to measure cell identity as a continuum, at a single-cell resolution. Capybara enables classification of discrete identities as well as cells with multiple identities.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Capybara is a R tool to measure cell identity and fate transitions. This approach is designed to measure cell identity as a continuum, at a single-cell resolution. Capybara enables classification of discrete identities as well as cells with multiple identities.
